guideDescription: Optional walkthrough - follow these steps to set up your school from scratch.
setupPaused: Setup guide paused - {completed} of {total} steps done.

account.title: Set up your profile
account.subtitle: A quick setup so your team knows who you are across ShuleOS.
account.welcomeBody: Welcome! You are signed in as a {role}. We will confirm your name and you can add a profile photo before you continue.
account.displayNameHint: This name appears on your profile, messages, and reports.
account.nameRequired: Please enter your name to continue.
account.saveFailed: Could not save your name. Try again.
account.photoPrompt: Optional — tap your photo to upload an image. JPG, PNG, GIF, or WebP up to 5MB.
account.photoReady: Photo uploaded. You can tap to change it.
account.photoUploadFailed: Could not upload your photo. Try again.
account.photoRequired: Add a profile photo to finish setup.
account.completeFailed: Could not finish setup. Try again.

welcome.title: Welcome
welcome.description: A short walkthrough to personalize your account.

profile.title: Your name
profile.description: Confirm how your name should appear across the platform.

photo.title: Profile photo
photo.description: Add a photo so teachers, staff, and families can recognize you. You can skip this and add one later in Settings.

website.title: Set up your public website
website.description: Add your story, contact details, and branding so families can learn about your school.

team.title: Invite your team
team.description: Add teachers, finance staff, and other roles so everyone has the right dashboard access.

subjects.title: Create subjects
subjects.description: Define the courses your school offers before building classes.

classes.title: Create classes
classes.description: Organize students into grade levels or homerooms.

students.title: Enroll your first student
students.description: Add a student record to start tracking attendance, grades, and fees.

timetable.title: Build your timetable
timetable.description: Assign subjects and teachers to class time slots.

publish.title: Publish your website
publish.description: When you are ready, enable your public site so families can find and apply.
